query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `scheduled_notifications` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `body` text NOT NULL,
  `imageUrl` text,
  `actionUrl` text,
  `platform` enum('web','mobile','all') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'all',
  `targetAudience` enum('all','users','couriers','business') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'all',
  `scheduledAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `repeatType` enum('once','daily','weekly') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'once',
  `repeatDays` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `repeatUntil` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','sent','cancelled','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `lastSentAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `sentCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `failedCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `errorMessage` text,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `sched_notif_status_idx` (`status`),
  KEY `sched_notif_scheduledAt_idx` (`scheduledAt`),
  KEY `sched_notif_createdBy_idx` (`createdBy`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
